Franchise Available – Eluru & West Godavari

Pharma Franchise in Eluru & West Godavari

Eluru is West Godavari's district headquarters — a well-connected commercial city on the NH-16 corridor with a solid healthcare infrastructure and two high-value sub-markets nearby: Bhimavaram and Tanuku. A PCD pharma franchise covering West Godavari with Crasenim Pharma gives you access to one of coastal Andhra's most consistently productive district pharmaceutical markets, with the flexibility to manage Eluru city plus sub-territories independently.

📍 Eluru, West Godavari 🛣️ NH-16 District HQ ✅ WHO GMP Certified Products 🏙️ Bhimavaram & Tanuku Sub-Markets
💬 Enquire via WhatsApp All Franchise Info
West Godavari Territory

Eluru, Bhimavaram & Tanuku — Three Franchise Opportunities in One District

West Godavari offers a rare combination of a well-established district headquarters city and two thriving secondary markets that can be franchised independently or together.

District HQ

Eluru City

District headquarters with government and private hospital concentration. Consistent prescription base from GPs, physicians and government medical facility procurement. NH-16 connectivity ensures reliable supply and easy management visits.

View FAQ
High Value Sub-Market

Bhimavaram

One of West Godavari's busiest pharma markets — dense GP network, strong private clinic base, and active pharmacy channel. Bhimavaram often rivals Eluru in total prescription volume despite being a smaller city. High-priority sub-territory.

Bhimavaram Franchise Info
Sub-Market

Tanuku

Active commercial town with good pharmacy coverage and a developing private clinic market. Tanuku pairs well with Bhimavaram as a combined West Godavari interior sub-territory, reachable in a half-day field circuit from Eluru or Bhimavaram.

Enquire about Tanuku
Products

Products for Eluru & West Godavari Franchise Partners

Antibiotic

Amoxsenim-CV 625

Amoxycillin 500mg + Clavulanic Acid 125mg. Strong GP and ENT prescription movement across Eluru and its sub-markets.

Anti-Hypertensive

Telsenim-40

Telmisartan 40mg with Smartdose™. Cardiac prescription movement from Eluru's hospital-based physicians and Bhimavaram's specialist clinics.

Diabetic

Metsenim-G1/G2

Metformin PR + Glimepiride. Growing diabetologist and physician prescriptions across West Godavari's developing private healthcare market.

Gastric

Pansenim-DSR

Pantoprazole 40mg + Domperidone 30mg SR. Consistently strong over all three West Godavari sub-markets.

Pediatric

Crasenim Bar

Syndet Bar pH 5.5. Paediatrician prescriptions and OTC counter movement across the West Godavari pharmacy network.

Wellness

Crasenim-LC

Mecobalamin + Folic Acid + L-Carnitine. Growing demand in general medicine and neurology OPDs in Eluru and Bhimavaram.

FAQs

Pharma Franchise in Eluru & West Godavari – FAQ

Can I take a franchise covering all three West Godavari markets — Eluru, Bhimavaram and Tanuku?
Yes. A combined West Godavari territory can include Eluru city, Bhimavaram and Tanuku depending on your field team capacity. Alternatively, each location can be franchised as an independent sub-territory. We will discuss the best arrangement during onboarding.
Is Eluru easily accessible for product deliveries and management support?
Yes. Eluru is on the NH-16 corridor between Vijayawada and Rajahmundry, making it one of the most logistically convenient district headquarters in AP. Road connectivity and express delivery services to Eluru are reliable.
Is prior pharma experience necessary for a West Godavari franchise?
Prior experience in pharma sales or distribution is preferred but not mandatory. We provide complete product training and promotional material support. Candidates with an existing doctor or chemist network in West Godavari are prioritised.
How do I enquire about the Eluru or Bhimavaram franchise?
WhatsApp us at +91 99890 74806 with your preferred territory and we will confirm current availability within 24 hours. You can also visit our Franchise page for a detailed overview.

Start Your West Godavari Pharma Franchise

Eluru, Bhimavaram or Tanuku — choose your West Godavari territory and start your Crasenim Pharma franchise today.
